filesChanged.notes: AppErrorCode enum with CONFIG_INVALID and SERVER_ERROR
Zod schema for PORT and LOG_LEVEL; imports dotenv/config at module load
createApp() factory; security headers and 64KB body limit applied to every request; handleRequest is async for enforceBodyLimit
Entry point: loadConfig -> pino -> createApp -> start

publicInterfaces.name: Config
publicInterfaces.signature: export type Config = { PORT: number; LOG_LEVEL: 'trace' | 'debug' | 'info' | 'warn' | 'error' }

publicInterfaces.name: createApp
publicInterfaces.signature: export function createApp(config: Config, log: Logger): App

publicInterfaces.name: App
publicInterfaces.signature: export type App = { start(): Promise<void>; stop(): Promise<void> }

edgeCasesFound: PORT=0 passes Zod min(1) check at schema level -- confirmed min is 1, not 0
server.close() passes an error to the callback when no connections were open on some Node versions -- handled with null check
knownLimitations: No request body parsing -- GET-only routes, not needed for this phase
No graceful SIGTERM handling -- can be added in a later phase
